articles.title: Crypto prediction markets are turning into dangerous national security risks, and Congress wants to ban them
articles.description: Bubblemaps investigators led by Nicolas Vaiman, discovered 80 bets on Polymarket with a 98% win rate that he said is statistically impossible to achieve.

articles.title: Spotify takes on Google’s NotebookLM with its new app
articles.description: Spotify is releasing the new desktop app as a research preview in more than 20 markets

articles.title: Spotify adds AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation features to podcasts
articles.description: Spotify will let you generate daily or weekly briefs based on your prompts

articles.title: Spotify will reserve tickets for top fans of an artists in a bid to drum up engagement
articles.description: Spotify said that it will monitor activity like streams and shares to determine who is a top fan

articles.title: U.S. CFTC secures deal with National Hockey League on prediction market safeguards
articles.description: A new arrangement has been set between the derivatives regulator and professional hockey, following on the heels of a similar baseball agreement.

articles.title: Crypto for Advisors: Crypto Products
articles.description: Advisors need to assess ETP custody, sponsor profiles, and fees. Read expert advice on bitcoin-backed loans, including margin call risks and when to sell vs. borrow.

articles.title: IG Europe taps Bitpanda to expand crypto trading across Europe
articles.description: IG Group, which launched spot crypto in the UK last year, is bringing the service to European investors through Bitpanda’s infrastructure.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: MoonPay expands into tokenized assets and DeFi markets with new platform for banks
articles.description: With MoonPay Trade, the crypto payments firm is building infrastructure for banks, fintechs to access stablecoins, tokenized funds and yield in a one-stop shop.

articles.title: NGC 1266 星系合併喚醒黑洞，吞噬新星誕生契機
articles.description: 首圖這張由美國太空總署哈伯太空望遠鏡拍攝的影像，展示了一個神祕的星系，它擁有明亮的中心和疑似螺旋結構的側面，但 […]

articles.title: The Path, founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alums, hopes to offer safer AI therapy
articles.description: The Path says its AI model has scored 95 on the mental health safety AI benchmark, Vera-MH. This compares to a top score of 65 for the consumer bots.

articles.title: Hark raises $700M Series A for its secretive “universal” AI interface
articles.description: Brett Adcock's new AI startup is now valued at $6 billion by its investors.

articles.title: Maka Kids is redefining kids’ screen time with a streaming app optimized for well-being, not engagement
articles.description: Maka Kids is building a streaming app for children ages zero to six featuring content designed for healthy development. The startup has now raised $3 million in seed funding to scale its platform.

articles.title: Peer-to-peer trading startup Variational raises $50 million for real-world perps in funding round led by Dragonfly
articles.description: The company is initially offering perpetual futures on real-world assets including oil, silver, copper and gold.

articles.title: Google is pitching an AI agent ecosystem to consumers who may not buy it
articles.description: The AI agents are coming. A lot of them.

articles.title: Live markets: Bitcoin's flat action continues as SpaceX IPO, Nvidia earnings capture news cycle
articles.description: Hyperliquid's HYPE is the outlier in crypto, rising 16.5% over the past 24 hours to a new record high.

articles.title: Blockchain.com files with SEC for U.S. IPO
articles.description: The crypto financial services firm submitted a draft S-1 to the SEC as it explores a public listing amid renewed momentum in digital asset markets.

articles.title: Hyperliquid whale won’t close HYPE short despite $22M unrealized loss
articles.description: HYPE’s rally is flashing exhaustion near its record-high resistance, raising the risk of a 20% pullback toward the $51.5–$45 support zone.

articles.title: With aluminum prices up 20%, recycling startups bet on AI to cash in
articles.description: Recycling startups are using AI to improve the recovery of critical minerals like aluminum, aiming to build a massive source of the metal.

articles.title: Kraken moves closer to UAE launch after Dubai regulatory approval
articles.description: Kraken’s parent company, Payward, received preliminary approval from Dubai's VARA, paving the way for UAE dirham funding, margin and OTC trading and institutional access via Kraken Prime.
